title: Yoga Progress Journal
author: Deokgu Studio
description:
Your yoga practice deserves more than a sticky mat and good intentions.

This 91-page yoga progress journal helps you track poses, breath, body sensations, and growth over time - turning your practice from a series of classes into a real, evolving discipline you can see.

Who it's for:
- Beginner yogis building consistency
- Intermediate practitioners working toward arm balances, inversions, or splits
- Yoga teachers in training (200/500 hour) documenting their own practice
- Studios and teachers gifting students a deeper learning tool

What's inside:
- Daily session pages: style (vinyasa, yin, hatha, ashtanga), duration, focus
- Pose tracker with progress notes: how it felt, where the edge was, what changed
- Breath, mood, and body-scan check-ins (pre and post practice)
- Goal-pose worksheets for poses you're working toward
- Weekly and monthly reflections - the pattern only shows up over time
- Mantra, intention, and gratitude pages woven through

Yoga isn't about flexibility - it's about awareness. This journal gives that awareness somewhere to land. Six months in, you won't recognize your old self.

Order your copy and roll out your mat with intention starting today.
categories: BISAC: BODY, MIND & SPIRIT / Mindfulness & Meditation
